institution.name: University of Colorado Denver/Anschutz Medical Campus
institution.address: 1380 Lawrence Street, Lawrence Street Center, Suite 1400

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Colorado Denver/Anschutz Medical Campus rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.4k → $29.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Colorado Denver/Anschutz Medical Campus rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.4k → $10.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Colorado Denver/Anschutz Medical Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Colorado Denver/Anschutz Medical Campus rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (24.5% → 28.8%).
